summary: The session focused on techniques for integrating characters' backstories and flashbacks into narratives without disrupting the flow. The user sought examples of books and movies that effectively utilize these storytelling methods and expressed interest in specific titles mentioned during the discussion.
facts: The user has seen the movie The Godfather and read the book The Handmaid's Tale. The user has read The Kite Runner and watched the movie Forrest Gump. The user is interested in checking out One Hundred Years of Solitude and House of Cards. The user has heard of the book The Midnight Library and has been meaning to check it out. The user has watched the movie A Star is Born and found it great. The user thinks the TV show This Is Us does an amazing job of weaving in flashbacks and backstories.
